rationale: The refactor cleanly introduces `LogBackend` / `TopicLog` / `PartitionLog` traits with the specified method shapes (including `FetchWait::{Immediate, LongPoll}` and `TopicConfig`), renames the in-memory types to `Memory*`, and threads `Arc<dyn LogBackend>` through the server, router, and all handlers. Legacy inherent methods are kept so existing tests continue to work — matching the "zero behavior change" requirement.
